overall.description: First-person gameplay footage exploring a futuristic industrial shipyard. The player moves from covered docks beneath a massive vessel through corridors into an open dry dock area with cranes and industrial buildings. The environment features metallic structures, shipping containers, and heavy machinery under an overcast sky.

events.description: player picks up ammunition from the ground

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered dock while holding a pistol, briefly stopping to collect ammunition

entered.detail: massive curved red metal hull of a spacecraft dominating the ceiling
grated metal walkway with yellow safety railings
heavy metal door with red paint and industrial lighting above
large white cargo container with industrial markings

segments.scene_description: The player begins in a narrow covered dock beneath a massive red spacecraft hull. The environment is industrial with metal catwalks, yellow safety railings, and storage containers. Artificial lighting illuminates the metallic surfaces as the player walks forward and collects ammunition from the ground.

events.description: player looks upward at ceiling vent while approaching a ladder

agents.ego_description: moving through the corridor while looking up at a ceiling vent and ladder structure, preparing to climb

entered.detail: metal ventilation grate in the ceiling with mesh pattern
red metal panel labeled HOLD VENT with warning markings
small red security booth with windows and industrial lighting
vertical metal ladder attached to the wall structure

segments.scene_description: Moving deeper under the spacecraft, the player navigates a maintenance corridor with white storage containers and industrial piping. The camera tilts upward to examine a ceiling vent and ladder structure near a red checkpoint booth, indicating a transition point in the environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial shipyard dock with heavy machinery

events.description: exits covered corridor into open dock area with natural lighting

agents.ego_description: emerging from the corridor into the open dock, moving toward large industrial structures and machinery

entered.detail: large multi-story industrial structure with dark windows and metallic facade
large orange industrial crane arm with mechanical joints
wheeled industrial platform with cabin and equipment
silver metal crowd control barriers along the walkway

segments.scene_description: The player emerges from the covered corridor into a vast open dock area under an overcast sky. A massive industrial building with dark windows dominates the view, while orange cranes and a mobile platform vehicle occupy the center of the concrete dock. The transition from artificial to natural lighting reveals the full scale of the shipyard.

scene_state.functional_zone: dry dock exterior with ship maintenance equipment

agents.ego_description: walking along the dock perimeter beside a concrete retaining wall, approaching ship maintenance equipment

entered.detail: tall concrete wall with metal fixtures and warning signs
massive hull of a spacecraft under construction or repair
yellow painted equipment container with warning labels
white metal cabinet with blue control panels and cables

segments.scene_description: Moving along the dock's edge, the player passes a concrete retaining wall with American flags and approaches the massive hull of a spacecraft under maintenance. The industrial equipment and electrical containers line the path as the player continues exploring the expansive dry dock area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the claustrophobic confines of a covered industrial dock into a vast, open-air shipyard. It begins beneath the massive red hull of a spacecraft, moving past metal catwalks and yellow safety railings while collecting ammunition from the ground. As the camera pushes deeper into the structure, the environment shifts into a maintenance corridor of white storage containers and industrial piping, momentarily tilting upward toward a ceiling vent and a red checkpoint booth. The scene then opens abruptly as the player emerges from the corridor into a wide dry dock under an overcast sky, where artificial light gives way to natural gray tones illuminating orange cranes and a massive industrial building. Finally, the camera glides along a concrete retaining wall adorned with American flags, passing electrical containers before approaching the towering hull of a spacecraft under maintenance.
